variants.modifierDescription: Enemies deal increased Magnetic damage and also have increased Immunity to said damage type.
Limited visibility in the tileset due to dense fog. Forced night cycle on planets like earth.
Eximus units have a much higher spawn rate in this mission. Some of their auras stack.
